case_title: LILY LIU VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-14-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2022 - CONTINUED TO JUL-07-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT CCSF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF LILY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY, ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF LILY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
